name: Mustard Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Cherry tomatoes, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettuccine according to package directions.
2. In a large skillet, heat 1 tbsp olive oil over high heat.
3. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute until very lightly browned.
4. Add chicken and cook, stirring, for 2-3 minutes until almost cooked through.
5. Add white wine and bring to a boil. Cook for 2 minutes.
6. Stir in Dijon mustard, capers, and pepper. Cook until just heated through; cover and keep warm.
7. Drain pasta.
8. In the same saucepan, heat remaining 1 tbsp olive oil over high heat.
9. Add cherry tomatoes and bell peppers. Cook, stirring, for 3-4 minutes until tender-crisp.
10. Return pasta to the pot and toss well.
11. To serve, place pasta mixture on a large platter. Spoon chicken mixture on top. Garnish as desired.
